name: Peminjaman form allows user to borrow an archive

planSteps.description: Fill the email input with 'admin@siwono.local' and the password input with 'password123'
Click the 'Daftar Arsip' link in the sidebar
Look at the table and copy the 'Nomor Warkah' of an archive that has the status 'Tersedia'
Click the 'Peminjaman' link in the sidebar
Verify the page heading 'Form Peminjaman Arsip' is visible
Fill in the 'Nomor Warkah' with the copied number, and fill in 'Nama Peminjam' and 'Keperluan / Catatan' fields
Verify the success message 'Peminjaman Berhasil Dicatat' is displayed
